problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
